steps.title: Recognize the slope as the rate of change
steps.content: The equation $d = 8t + 210$ is in the form $d = mt + b$, where the slope $m = 8$ represents the rate of change of distance with respect to time. The rover's distance increases at a constant rate of 8 feet per minute.

steps.title: Calculate the total increase over 20 minutes
steps.content:
Over 20 minutes at 8 feet per minute:

$$8 \times 20 = 160 \text{ feet}$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
